description: Aggregate repatriations. This figure plots annual aggregate repatriations of U.S. multinationals’ foreign subsidiaries to their U.S. parents. Values are in billions of 2018 U.S. dollars.

Dynamic estimates. This figure plots the estimated coefficients, βs, from Eq. (2). The dependent variable is U.S. investment (Panel A), U.S. employment (Panel B), foreign investment (Panel C), foreign employment (Panel D), cash holdings (Panel E), and total payout (Panel F). The vertical lines denote 95% confidence intervals. The coefficient corresponding to the years 2010–2014 in Eq. (2) is denoted by 2014 in each panel. Appendix A contains variable definitions.
